ultrasonic_boot/elongation.comment: Belt elongation sensor - Actual operational range 40-340mm

temperature_boot_material/temperature.comment: Temperature in Celsius - Warning at 90°C, Critical at 100°C

ultrasonic_boot/elongation.comment: Elongation in mm - Warning at 300mm, Critical at 310mm

current_transducer_head/current.comment: Current in Amperes - Warning at 62A, Critical at 70A

operational_states.comment: Current thresholds in Amperes - Idle if current < 4.5A (based on data), Max system current is 70A

idle_detection.comment: Idle state: current < 4.5A (planned stop). Effective days accumulation pauses during idle.

physics_model.comment: degradation_model can be 'power_law' (default) or 'second_order' (NR/EPDM hardening kinetics). Power-law uses ΔShore = k * t_eff^n. Arrhenius uses config constants (activation energy, gas constant). arrhenius_reference_mode='csv_running_mean' uses cumulative material-temperature history as a dynamic baseline so thermal effects remain active and stable. enforce_baseline_rul_cap=true hard-caps physics RUL at baseline_rul_days.

second_order.comment: Optional NR/EPDM-inspired second-order hardening model: dH/dt = k(T) * (H_inf - H)^2 with k(T)=exp(lnA - Ea/(R*T)). Enable and set physics_model.degradation_model='second_order' to activate.

arrhenius.comment: Arrhenius thermal acceleration: faster aging at higher temperatures

ml_fusion.comment: ML penalty [0, 40] reduces physics health and RUL. Factor clips between 0.60-1.0

data_quality.comment: Data quality thresholds for validation and confidence scoring

baseline_values.comment: Baseline values for RUL calculation - 72 months = 6 years standard life
